title: U.S. Department of the Treasury Releases Final Rules on Investment Tax Credit to Produce Clean Power, Strengthen Clean Energy Economy
content: Today, the U.S. Department of the Treasury and the IRS released final rules for the Section 48 Energy Credit â€“ also known as the Investment Tax Credit (ITC) â€“ that will give clean energy project developers clarity and certainty to undertake major investments to produce more clean power and further strengthen Americaâ€™s clean energy economy.
author: Analysts Account
